name: PPE Compliance
description: Person-level PPE compliance monitoring. Detects helmet and high-visibility vest per tracked worker in real time, with temporal grace, evidence smoothing and cooldown so brief detection flicker never raises a false violation. Emits missing / removed / compliant events with snapshots.

fields.label: PPE compliance
fields.help: Run per-worker PPE compliance on this camera.

fields.label: Required PPE
fields.help: PPE a worker must wear in this zone. A worker missing any required item raises a violation.

fields.label: Compliant events
fields.help: Also record a positive event when a worker is confirmed wearing all required PPE.

fields.label: Missing grace (s)
fields.help: Seconds a required item must stay absent before a violation fires (absorbs brief occlusion).

fields.label: Stable present (s)
fields.help: Seconds PPE must be steadily worn before its later absence counts as 'removed' (vs 'missing').

fields.label: Alert cooldown (s)
fields.help: Minimum gap between repeat violations for the same worker + item.

fields.label: Person confidence
fields.help: Detector confidence floor for tracking a person.

fields.label: Helmet confidence
fields.help: How sure the detector must be to count a helmet as worn. Raise it if plain-clothes people are wrongly marked compliant.

fields.label: Vest confidence
fields.help: How sure the detector must be to count a safety vest as worn.

fields.label: Region of interest
fields.help: Only workers whose feet fall inside this zone are evaluated.
